title: Minks Resist the Beast Pirates
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on minks resist the beast pirates within the Ten Days Before the Straw Hats Arrived storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm sooorry!! There was nothing we could do!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...I mean, to tell you guys the truth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're pretty confused right now too... our heads are all over the place.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: In fact, I've just barely wrapped my head around our current situation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...that's right!!! If I remember correctly, the last time we had any correspondence with your was when you guys stumbled across Bigma's ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And after we finally get to zoo, we find out that Zou's a city in ruins on an elephant's back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: full of animals that can talk!!

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Truth be told, we arrived here thinking the Minks would be hostile towards us... but, on the contrary, they've ended up being extremely hospitable and friendly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: saying that we're comrades of the ones they owe their lives to!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...Could you please just tell us the entire story from the very beginning, Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: everything that's happened to you guys over the course of these 11 days ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...I suppose you're right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I guess I was being too anxious and hasty...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So this is how it happened...

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Sanji!! Nami!! Chopper!! Brook!! Momo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You guys all head off to [Zou] first!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...Back then, in the waters near Dressrossa...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We had run into...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: THE GIGANTIC FLAGSHIP OF THE [BIGMAN PIRATES]...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The "Singing ship"...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: SINGII- ING..?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: From what we could tell, their forces included...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The duo that Luffy met back on fishman Island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: GAOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Sink 'em Soir!!!

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Someone from the worst generation, "Capone 'Gang' Bege"

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: beget!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Apparently they've teamed up with bignam.

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: He was originally after Caesar...

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Which made Caesar all the more fearful of getting captured...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Heeey!! Help meee~!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But to be honest, we would never have been able to outrun someone like them....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So if we didn't do something, it was only a matter of time before they got to us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Let's use "Coup de burst" and burst our way to freedom!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But frankly and usopp aren't here... and I have absolutely no idea how to work this thing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: However, I do know how to fire the "Gaon cannon"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You idiot!! This is not the situation to be turning around and facing them head on!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We'll fight on the stern and create an opening!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: "Soul Parade"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Doo- hooo!! I'll remember this, you bastards !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Using me in all my glory as just some sack!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If you don't do what we say, we'll leave you to find for your- self.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: He's all yours, Sanji~!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: 'Poelle A Trire'

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: 'Spotre''

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: GYAA AAA-!!!

summary: Minks Resist the Beast Pirates: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
